content.fact_text: Implementation of a secure cryptographic engine for the ecommerce backend using AES-256-GCM, Argon2id, and RS256.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides AES-256-GCM encryption/decryption, Argon2id password hashing/verification, and RS256 JWT signing/verification. Side effects include secure data transformation and authentication state management.
provenance_data.utility: Provides a robust, production-ready security layer handling encryption, hashing, and token management for the ecommerce backend, satisfying strict security and compliance requirements.
